name: Trump Headquarters
subject: PENDING: 2018 Poll Response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
100% to the people. 100% from the people. 100% official. |
---
| | | | | | |

Friend,

Have you seen this headline?
**" GALLUP TO END DAILY PRESIDENTIAL APPROVAL POLLS"**
(_The Hill_ , 1/3/18)
We're the OFFICIAL polling team of President Trump, and to get REAL approval numbers in the media we're showing the strength of our grassroots movement and calling on top supporters.

**We noticed your 2018 response is pending, Friend.**
**How would you rate President Trump 's job performance? ** [GREAT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=970467a6499f0549d011c5987bd00d50d9bd071c2140b71b9c97a05f7ebb7611d1598083ea62e61747ec6283fda388d2c3ba2337c75a55f8) [GOOD](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=970467a6499f0549cb1309f8ffafb3f01a9f55ae3015caf23c5dfbada1a602d8344a493398c9e8f3304ed5b647ae7913ca969e318dbad197) [OKAY](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=970467a6499f0549ccfcc0a40c80551155521f8c4ce2f0078bf583803cb856ce9f279d0371901127d7bb93403f85da0b285375b857377b4a) [OTHER](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=970467a6499f05491fbac610822ed1bc522e0ef26cd943434dd0a74c7a416ea3cdf5c532aa0d76aa24b21a3d001583e6e1e060d9ca329ab4)
_**Now that Gallup is no longer running a daily tracker, liberal outlets will try to take its place. Your immediate response is CRUCIAL.**_

**[Please, take a moment to take the Official Presidential Approval Poll today and let President Trump know your thoughts.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=970467a6499f0549cf5351755a67e4591a7ba8d039e53bff30b32726fcb80ecc15e42449f93edd89e1a86142edddd19987b70e1093bac5c7)**
[TAKE THE POLL](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=970467a6499f05491fbac610822ed1bc522e0ef26cd943434dd0a74c7a416ea3cdf5c532aa0d76aa24b21a3d001583e6e1e060d9ca329ab4) Thank you,

Trump Headquarters
Official Polling Team

[TAKE THE POLL](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=970467a6499f05491fbac610822ed1bc522e0ef26cd943434dd0a74c7a416ea3cdf5c532aa0d76aa24b21a3d001583e6e1e060d9ca329ab4)
---

Paid for by the Republican National Committee
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.GOP.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=970467a6499f05495b65d1235cd0f9d40d038de54a3369cf15bcc129f7ec83402d2779c7382293d7f67537f48b1bad957acea9e4aed1b25a) You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=970467a6499f0549167264a041025bea726724cc9f6ba1ac1380474b05b2463567c4df9c238656cfd707bffe20dee22eb9ff182cafe7e867) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fc2f3ef3797f176f30db6561cb4086920782698e6e43db897dba43ce14ff7b826088e4e1a01b1f10d1d3230e8ca2ead06f) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fccf6ebf77cd5e8ea547e65639e0dc256c80dc7ff884e13e786d67319c65220facd268ce23ef4e2fa15f8751ceb3e041b1)
---

name: Team Kasich
subject: The latest
body:
Gov. John Kasich recently authored an op-ed in the Washington
Post about the dangers of talking about a possible nuclear
exchange with North Korea.

Peter, Gov. John Kasich
recently authored an op-ed in the Washington Post about the
dangers of talking about a possible nuclear exchange with North
Korea:

Washington Post: Loose Talk About
War with North Korea is Irresponsible

Gov. Kasich was also a guest on
several national news shows this past week. Below are some clips
that you can watch and share on social media.

"Republicans need to start
solving problems to keep winning elections."

"Sure, the media has its biases
and makes its mistakes, but the value of a free press is
unwavering. It's an essential check on government."

"Throwing around that we are
going to be involved in a war involving nuclear weapons isn't
right and isn't correct foreign policy."

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help!

-Team Kasich

P.S. If you'd like to chip in to
support Gov. Kasich's message, please consider making a generous
donation at: JohnKasich.com/Donate

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/iWDpk8ZoNL

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/oWDpk8ZoNL

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-48824370243-echo3-BB17EB3295E42944B967B4BE2A0BAB40@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.
